Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order For Judgment On The Pleadings; Point And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Nov-10-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF GCFS, INC.'s Motion For An Order For Judgment On The Pleadings.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed motion for judgment on the pleadings is granted. Plaintiff is entitled to judgment based on defendant's admissions. Judgment to be entered in favor of plaintiff forthwith.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem Admitted The Truth Of Any Matters Specified In Requests For Admission; Monetary Sanctions; Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Brent D Peterson
Off Calendar Oct-06-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF GCFS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION's Motion To Deem Admitted The Truth Of Any Matters Specified In Requests For Admission; Monetary Sanctions:

Motion granted. Defendants' Requests for Admission, Set No. 1, are deemed admitted. Request for sanction against Defendant Moises Raymundo individually and dba Infinite Iron Work and Design in the amount of $460 is also granted. No opposition filed.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the substantive portion of the Court's ruling via email to williamclynn@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: William Lynn, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
